title: koeleria spicata subsp. tibetica
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. tibetica, also known as Tibetan Koeleria, is a subspecies of the Koeleria spicata plant, a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Tibet. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In traditional Tibetan medicine, Koeleria spicata subsp. tibetica is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and treat various ailments.
